channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Canada's top military commander calls out US senator for questioning a woman's role in combat
item.description: HALIFAX, Nova Scotia (AP) — The first woman to command Canada's military called out a U.S. senator on Saturday for questioning the role of women in combat. Gen. Jennie Carignan responded to comments made by Idaho Republican Sen. Jim Risch, the ranking member of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blinken heads to last G7 meeting of Biden presidency with Ukraine and Mideast topping the agenda
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Secretary of State Antony Blinken is leaving Saturday on a diplomatic trip to Europe that includes a meeting of foreign ministers from the leading industrialized nations that will focus on the wars in Ukraine and the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas AG sues Dallas for decriminalizing marijuana
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has sued the city of Dallas over a ballot measure that decriminalizes possession of small amounts of marijuana, arguing it violates state law.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 24 states' attorneys general call on Supreme Court to keep biological boys out of girls sports
item.description: Attorneys general from 24 states are asking the Supreme Court to reverse a lower court ruling and uphold an Arizona law to ban biological boys from girls sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump will appoint 'dozens' of judges, experts say, despite Dems ramming through nominees in lame-duck session
item.description: Despite Senate Democrats' efforts to push through as many of President Biden's judicial picks ahead of President-elect Donald Trump's presidency, experts say Trump will have plenty of additional vacancies to fill during his second administration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump taps a Fox News personality, a surgeon and a former Congressman to lead public health agencies
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump on Friday nominated Dr. Marty Makary to lead the Food and Drug Administration, selecting a surgeon and author who gained national attention for opposing vaccine mandates and some other public health measures during the COVID-19 pandemic.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW PERRONE and AMANDA SEITZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump picks Scott Turner as secretary for Department of Housing and Urban Development
item.description: President-elect Trump nominated former NFL cornerback Scott Turner and Texas state representative as the secretary of the Department of Housing and Urban Development.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump nominates Rep. Lori Chavez-DeRemer as secretary of labor
item.description: President-elect Trump has nominated Congresswoman Lori Chavez-DeRemer for secretary of labor as he continues to form his Cabinet.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump picks Dr. Janette Nesheiwat as nation's next surgeon general
item.description: President-elect Trump has nominated Dr. Janette Nesheiwat as surgeon general, calling her a "fierce advocate and strong communicator for preventative medicine and public health.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SEC Chair Gary Gensler, who took aim at crypto industry, to step down in January
item.description: Gensler said he would step down on Jan. 20, when Donald Trump will inaugurated as the next president. Gensler took big enforcement actions against the crypto industry.
item.dc:creator: Maria Aspan, MPR News

item.title: AP Decision Notes: What to expect in Mississippi's judicial runoff elections
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Voters in central Mississippi and the state’s Delta and Gulf Coast areas will return to the polls Tuesday to resolve two judicial races in which no candidate received the vote majority needed in the Nov. 5 general election to avoid a runoff.
item.dc:creator: ROBERT YOON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about Pam Bondi, Trump's new pick for attorney general
item.description: Pam Bondi, the former Florida attorney general, is Donald Trump’s new pick to serve as U.S. attorney general.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price And Colleen Long, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Florida legislators won't have special session for condo concerns
item.description: Florida condo owners are facing a conundrum. Units for sale are sitting on the market longer and owners who want to stay are facing rising costs.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Musk's DOGE commission considering mobile tax filing app: Report
item.description: The new DOGE commission is considering developing a free mobile app for tax filing, according to The Washington Post.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Listen: New York Times reporter Reid Epstein on Ken Martin’s bid for DNC chair
item.description: Reid Epstein, a reporter with The New York Times, spoke with Martin, who argued Democrats’ downfall was their message failing to land with voters ahead of the 2024 election.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: House Ethics Committee is deadlocked on whether to release Gaetz report
item.description: The U.S. House Committee on Ethics is deadlocked on whether to release its report into former Rep. Matt Gaetz, whose nomination to serve as Trump’s attorney general has been plagued by controversy.
item.dc:creator: Deirdre Walsh and Lexie Schapitl, MPR News

item.title: Trump picks business executive Linda McMahon to lead the Education Department
item.description: McMahon is a professional wrestling business magnate and co-chair of President-elect Donald Trump's transition team. She has limited experience working with K-12 public schools.
item.dc:creator: Cory Turner and Jonaki Mehta, MPR News

item.title: Nevada attorney general pledges to combat 'unconstitutional mandates' amid Trump election
item.description: Democratic Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford said his office was prepared to address any “fear and uncertainty” following the election of President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Italian village offering $1 homes to Americans wanting to relocate after election
item.description: A small rural village in Italy is offering homes for as little as $1.06 after the 2024 presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC

item.title: A GOP lawmaker introduces a Capitol bathroom rule before her trans colleague arrives
item.description: South Carolina Rep. Nancy Mace says the resolution aims to protect women's rights. Democratic Rep.-elect Sarah McBride, the first out trans person elected to Congress, has slammed it as a distraction.
item.dc:creator: Elena Moore and Rachel Treisman, MPR News

item.title: Trump watches as Musk’s SpaceX launches Starship rocket
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is expected to attend the launch of a SpaceX rocket in Texas on Tuesday, sources familiar with the plans confirmed, in the latest sign of Trump’s closeness to the company's billionaire CEO Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Speaker Johnson becomes 'MAGA' Mike, cementing place in Trump's circle
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) is cementing his place in President-elect Trump’s inner orbit, becoming not only a visible — if slightly out-of-place-looking — part of his entourage, but a key supporter of his no-holds-barred approach to his second term.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WGN 9

item.title: Student protesters face potential Trump crackdown
item.description: Those on campus have already seen stricter rules around demonstrations this academic year, but President-elect Trump, as a candidate, has threatened protesters with everything from military action to deportation.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, Fox 5
